root_cause: Kafka consumer processed messages more than once due to at-least-once delivery semantics
business_impact: Revenue figures inflated by ~2%, daily order count overstated in dashboards
fix_sql: DELETE FROM RETAILMIND.RAW.ORDERS WHERE order_id IN (SELECT order_id FROM RETAILMIND.RAW.ORDERS GROUP BY order_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) AND _loaded_at < (SELECT MAX(_loaded_at) FROM RETAILMIND.RAW.ORDERS o2 WHERE o2.order_id = ORDERS.order_id);
prevention: Add 'unique' and 'not_null' dbt tests on order_id in sources.yml
